title: canarium sumatranum
intro: Canarium sumatranum, also known as the Sumatran Canarium or Maha, is a tropical tree species native to Indonesia and Malaysia, belonging to the family Burseraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Canarium sumatranum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Canarium sumatranum include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
